---
title: "Alexa Bueno - Group 2"
format: html
---



## Topic

[Shopify Sales Dataset](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/aliiihussain/shopify-sales-dataset-for-ml-and-eda?resource=download)

## Research Question

How do customer ratings and return behavior influence customer purchasing patterns and overall customer satisfaction in a Shopify store?

## Project Objectives

1. To analyze the relationship between customer ratings, product returns, and customer purchasing behavior.

2. To identify which factors contribute to higher customer satisfaction and improved shopping experiences in an e-commerce environment.
